name: harness-loom
description: Install and grow producer-reviewer harnesses for repository work.

interface.shortDescription: Install and grow producer-reviewer harnesses in repos
interface.longDescription: Harness Loom seeds a planning and orchestration harness into a target repository, then helps you add, improve, and split project-specific producer-reviewer pairs.
defaultPrompt: Install the harness foundation into this repository.
Add a producer-reviewer pair for a new project workflow.
Improve or split an overloaded harness pair.
